title: OpenClaw Creator's new secret project...
summary: AI Jason announces a new project related to OpenClaw, referencing Crabbox and Codebase harness tools. The GitHub repository contains skills for setup, with accompanying educational resources through AI Builder Club and Superdesign platform.
writeup: AI Jason covers a newly announced project from the OpenClaw creator, centered on Crabbox and Codebase harness tools distributed through GitHub. The video situates these developer tools within a broader ecosystem that includes Superdesign as a related product and AI Builder Club as a source of community resources. Framed around multi-agent systems and developer tooling, it points viewers toward where to find the project and its associated resources.
